title: Crepidomanes intricatum
taxonomy: Crepidomanes intricatum is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This family is part of the order Hymenophyllales, which consists of a small group of ferns commonly known as filmy ferns. The Hymenophyllales order is also a part of the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants that also includes the order Polypodiales. The class Polypodiopsida is further classified under the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. These plants are non-vascular and reproduce using spores.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms associated with various diseases.
